description: Package verifier-gated selected runs into condition-aware, five-camera dataset and review layouts with per-run and bundle overalls, lineage, hashes, signal availability, and failure visibility.
physical_assumptions: Dataset samples must preserve the link from prompt/case to scene, assets, physics controls, runtime outputs, and verifier decision.
Failed or incomplete samples should remain auditable but not training-ready.
Generated media, local assets, and runs are local artifacts and should not be committed to the harness repo.
Multiple render attempts inside one session are candidates for one selected source run, not independent physics runs.
Different exact inputs require explicit condition labels and are causal variants rather than quality-winner candidates.
verifier_rules: Readiness fields agree with verifier and render sync reports.
Sample source type and proxy status are explicit.
Generated artifacts are excluded from public commits.
Formal deliveries contain at least three selected runs and the same three static plus two moving cameras for every run.
Each run has RGB/depth/segmentation overalls, and the bundle has one additional overall per modality.
Differing fingerprints have a one-to-one mapping to declared condition labels.
All selected runs share one camera/render acquisition fingerprint and RGB frame-count profile.
repair_suggestions: Fix missing runtime artifacts before packaging.
Keep failed samples in reports but outside training-ready shards.
Use hashes and manifest paths to detect accidental artifact drift.
Add or correct --condition when intentionally packaging different parameter inputs.
Regenerate missing per-run overalls before publishing the bundle.
